things.name: Taj Mahal, Agra
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Mughal marble mausoleum - one of the New Seven Wonders of the World

things.name: Red Fort (Lal Qila)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 17th-century Mughal fortress with a sound and light show

things.name: Qutb Minar
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 73m 12th-century minaret - the tallest brick minaret in the world

things.name: Humayun's Tomb
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Mughal garden tomb that inspired the Taj Mahal

things.name: Chandni Chowk Market
things.description: Mogul-era market with spice, jewellery and fabric bazaars in the heart of Old Delhi

things.name: India Gate
things.description: Lutyens' triumphal arch commemorating 90,000 soldiers killed in WWI - Delhi's Arc de Triomphe

things.name: Lotus Temple
things.description: Bahai House of Worship shaped as a marble lotus flower - open to all religions

things.name: National Museum of India
things.description: India's most comprehensive museum with over 200,000 artefacts from Harappan times

things.name: Akshardham Temple
things.description: Spectacular new Hindu temple - the world's largest comprehensive Hindu temple complex

things.name: Lodi Garden
things.description: 15th-century Lodi dynasty tombs amid beautiful gardens - a serene city escape
